title: Sensitive Port 21 Open — FTP
description: Port 21/tcp (ftp) is publicly accessible on kjsit.somaiya.edu.in. FTP — cleartext file transfer. Sensitive services exposed to the internet are prime targets for brute-force, exploitation, and lateral movement.
action: Immediately restrict port 21 to internal network or VPN only via firewall rules. If this service is not needed, disable it entirely.

title: Sensitive Port 25 Open — SMTP
description: Port 25/tcp (smtp) is publicly accessible on kjsit.somaiya.edu.in. SMTP — mail relay. Sensitive services exposed to the internet are prime targets for brute-force, exploitation, and lateral movement.
action: Immediately restrict port 25 to internal network or VPN only via firewall rules. If this service is not needed, disable it entirely.

title: Sensitive Port 53 Open — DOMAIN
description: Port 53/tcp (domain) is publicly accessible on kjsit.somaiya.edu.in. DNS — potentially open resolver. Sensitive services exposed to the internet are prime targets for brute-force, exploitation, and lateral movement.
action: Immediately restrict port 53 to internal network or VPN only via firewall rules. If this service is not needed, disable it entirely.

title: Public Cloud Bucket Exposed — S3
description: The bucket 'edu' on S3 (http://edu.s3.amazonaws.com) is publicly accessible (HTTP 200). Anyone on the internet can read its contents.
action: Immediately set the bucket ACL / policy to private. Audit its contents for sensitive data. Enable access logging and review who accessed it.

title: Bucket Directory Listing Enabled — S3
description: Bucket 'edu' on S3 (http://edu.s3.amazonaws.com) has directory listing enabled — all stored objects can be enumerated.
action: Disable public listing on the bucket. Review listed objects for sensitive data and rotate any exposed credentials.

title: Port 80 Open — HTTP
description: Port 80/tcp (http) is open on kjsit.somaiya.edu.in. HTTP — unencrypted web traffic. Verify this is intentionally public.
action: Confirm port 80 is intentionally internet-facing. Ensure the service is up to date and properly configured.

title: Port 443 Open — HTTPS
description: Port 443/tcp (https) is open on kjsit.somaiya.edu.in. HTTPS — encrypted web traffic. Verify this is intentionally public.
action: Confirm port 443 is intentionally internet-facing. Ensure the service is up to date and properly configured.
